name: Japanese WordNet (Open Multilingual Wordnet v2.0)
attribution: Japanese WordNet via Open Multilingual Wordnet. Bond, Baldwin et al.
notes: Lemmas may contain '+' morpheme-join markers (e.g. 呼吸+する); importer strips them (--join-marker). File carries lemma-synset membership only, no SynsetRelation elements: within-language synonymy comes from co-membership, relations inherit from the PWN/ILI backbone.
